goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 16:15' and should go to 'broxbourne'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the lucky star'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '11:45' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 16:15 and should go to broxbourne
The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the lucky star
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 11:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
